title: رفع خطاهای تکراری User not found و انتشار مرحله‌ای نادرست
summary: سرویس حذف‌شده از پنل به‌جای تولید بی‌نهایت خطای User not found به remote_missing تبدیل می‌شود و پایش آن متوقف می‌گردد؛ انتشار Edge و Processor نیز با API محتوای Cloudflare و بدون تغییر Bindingها انجام می‌شود و Core تا تأیید Workerهای جانبی completed نمی‌شود.
features: classifies HTTP 404 and User not found as a removed remote service instead of an infrastructure failure
marks the delivered order as remote_missing and disables repeated health monitoring for the missing username
resolves recovered service-health and notification errors per bot only when no real failure remains in that batch
excludes remote_missing services from recurring notification sync
uploads Edge and Processor through Cloudflare script content endpoint so existing configuration and bindings are untouched
fails staged rollout immediately when a required side Worker is not verified
records Edge and Processor as verified before a rollout can become completed
repairs historical completed rows that incorrectly retained pending side-worker states
limits failed-rollout headline count to the most recent 24 hours
changes: خطاهای User not found مربوط به سرویس حذف‌شده دیگر در مرکز خطا تکرار نمی‌شوند.
سرویس حذف‌شده با وضعیت remote_missing ثبت و پایش سلامت آن غیرفعال می‌شود.
خطای سلامت یا اعلان فقط وقتی بسته می‌شود که برای همان ربات در چرخه جاری خطای واقعی دیگری وجود نداشته باشد.
بروزرسانی Edge و Processor فقط محتوای worker.js را تغییر می‌دهد و Bindingها، D1، مسیرها و تنظیمات Worker را بازنویسی نمی‌کند.
در صورت شکست Edge یا Processor، انتشار Core ادامه پیدا نمی‌کند و وضعیت completed کاذب ثبت نمی‌شود.
ردیف‌های قدیمی completed با Edge/Processor pending در اجرای بعدی اصلاح یا superseded می‌شوند.
عدد انتشار ناموفق در مرکز خطا فقط تلاش‌های ۲۴ ساعت اخیر را نشان می‌دهد.

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload ZIP through the central bot
deployment.automatic_migration: no new table or manual SQL; stale error rows resolve automatically after Processor runs
required_bindings: Core: PASARGUARD_DB, EDGE_WORKER, PROCESSOR_WORKER and LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR
deployment.durable_object: LiveUsageCoordinator with existing migration tag v3.1.9-live-usage

validation.worker_syntax: passed: node --check for core, edge and processor
validation.remote_user_not_found_classifier: passed: HTTP 404, English User not found and Persian not-found cases
validation.orphan_service_flow: passed: static contract verifies remote_missing, monitor disable and notification exclusion
validation.side_worker_upload: passed: Edge and Processor use /content and do not use bindings_inherit=strict in their deploy functions
validation.staged_rollout: passed: required side-worker failure throws before Core and completed writes verified side statuses
validation.version_markers: passed: 3.3.56 markers in all three Workers and Service Worker assets
validation.zip_integrity: passed: clean nine-entry archive structure and CRC validation
validation.live_api: not run; requires production PasarGuard, Marzban and Cloudflare credentials

limitations: Existing open User not found errors close after the new Processor executes its next service-health or notification cycle.
Production Cloudflare upload and Service Binding verification must be confirmed after deployment.
